data.name: Spicier Than Sugar!
data.detailed_description:
Spicier than sugar is a kinetic visual novel that tells the story of Derek, Tiffany and some other characters involved in the birth, growth and bloom of their love and sexual relationship, among emotions, doubts, issues and... Better not to spoil to much...

The aim is to put all our efforts into quality, both graphic and narrative.



The use of the simple, straightforward structure of the kinetic novel will allow for maximum depth in the story, dialogues, and character personality development.



Really hope you'll like it!

- Images In the Game: 1300+
- Animations In the Game: 10+
- Dialogues in the Game: 21000+ words
- Replays to Unlock: 29

data.short_description: A kinetic visual novel about love, in all its deepest forms.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
